trigger.reason: OpenAI launched new voice intelligence features in its API with explicit applications in customer service, education, and creator platforms—a capability demo from a top-tier lab targeting vertical use cases that will likely trigger sympathy-fade selling in customer-service software and edtech stocks.

primary_event.headline: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
primary_event.summary: OpenAI announced new voice intelligence capabilities available through its API, designed for customer service systems and with applications across education and creator platforms. The release expands OpenAI's tooling for voice-driven automation across multiple verticals.

secondary_events.headline: Perplexity's Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
